calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-04-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Michelle L. Steigerwald, Esq. for Plaintiff State Farm Mutual Automobile Insurance Company.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant Bruce Ricci.
Damages of $28,197.29
Costs of $278.50
For the total of $28,475.79
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2003 Continued To Dec-01-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
